---
title: "Market News & Events"
format: html
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---


```{r}
library(httr2)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)
library(plotly)
library(lubridate)
library(htmltools)

ticker <- "^SPX"
range_label <- "60d"

RANGE_OPTIONS <- list(
  "1d"   = list(days = 1,   range = "1d",  interval = "5m"),
  "5d"   = list(days = 5,   range = "5d",  interval = "15m"),
  "10d"  = list(days = 10,  range = NULL,  interval = "1h"),
  "20d"  = list(days = 20,  range = NULL,  interval = "1d"),
  "30d"  = list(days = 30,  range = NULL,  interval = "1d"),
  "60d"  = list(days = 60,  range = NULL,  interval = "1d"),
  "90d"  = list(days = 90,  range = NULL,  interval = "1d"),
  "120d" = list(days = 120, range = NULL,  interval = "1d"),
  "180d" = list(days = 180, range = NULL,  interval = "1d"),
  "270d" = list(days = 270, range = NULL,  interval = "1d"),
  "1Y"   = list(days = 365, range = NULL,  interval = "1d"),
  "YTD"  = list(days = NA,  range = "ytd", interval = "1d")
)

`%||%` <- function(x, y) {
  if (is.null(x)) y else x
}

fetch_stock_data <- function(ticker, range_label) {
  opt <- RANGE_OPTIONS[[range_label]]

  base_url <- paste0(
    "https://query1.finance.yahoo.com/v8/finance/chart/",
    URLencode(ticker, reserved = TRUE)
  )

  req <- request(base_url)

  if (!is.null(opt$range)) {
    req <- req |>
      req_url_query(
        range = opt$range,
        interval = opt$interval
      )
  } else {
    end_time <- as.integer(Sys.time())
    start_time <- end_time - as.integer(opt$days * 24 * 60 * 60)

    req <- req |>
      req_url_query(
        period1 = start_time,
        period2 = end_time,
        interval = opt$interval
      )
  }

  resp <- req |>
    req_headers(Accept = "application/json") |>
    req_perform()

  json <- resp_body_json(resp, simplifyVector = FALSE)

  result <- json$chart$result[[1]]

  if (is.null(result)) {
    err <- json$chart$error$description %||% "No data returned."
    stop(err)
  }

  timestamps <- unlist(result$timestamp)
  quote <- result$indicators$quote[[1]]

  rows <- tibble(
    datetime = as.POSIXct(timestamps, origin = "1970-01-01", tz = "UTC"),
    open     = unlist(quote$open),
    high     = unlist(quote$high),
    low      = unlist(quote$low),
    close    = unlist(quote$close),
    volume   = unlist(quote$volume)
  ) |>
    filter(!is.na(close))

  meta <- result$meta

  list(
    rows = rows,
    meta = list(
      currency     = meta$currency %||% "USD",
      exchangeName = meta$exchangeName %||% "",
      lastPrice    = meta$regularMarketPrice %||% NA_real_
    )
  )
}

stock <- fetch_stock_data(ticker, range_label)

rows <- stock$rows
meta <- stock$meta

last_price <- if (!is.na(meta$lastPrice)) {
  meta$lastPrice
} else {
  tail(rows$close, 1)
}

vol_colors <- ifelse(
  seq_along(rows$close) == 1,
  "#90caf9",
  ifelse(rows$close >= dplyr::lag(rows$close, default = rows$close[1]), "#a5d6a7", "#ef9a9a")
)

plot_ly() |>
  add_lines(
    data = rows,
    x = ~datetime,
    y = ~close,
    name = ticker,
    line = list(color = "#0057b8", width = 2),
    hovertemplate = "<b>%{x}</b><br>Close: $%{y:.2f}<extra></extra>",
    yaxis = "y"
  ) |>
  add_bars(
    data = rows,
    x = ~datetime,
    y = ~volume,
    name = "Volume",
    marker = list(color = vol_colors),
    opacity = 0.75,
    hovertemplate = "Vol: %{y:,.0f}<extra></extra>",
    yaxis = "y2"
  ) |>
  layout(
    title = list(
      text = paste0("<b>", ticker, "</b> — ", range_label),
      x = 0.02
    ),
    xaxis = list(
      type = "date",
      showgrid = TRUE,
      gridcolor = "#eef0f4",
      rangeslider = list(visible = FALSE)
    ),
    yaxis = list(
      title = "Price (USD)",
      domain = c(0.26, 1),
      showgrid = TRUE,
      gridcolor = "#eef0f4",
      tickprefix = "$"
    ),
    yaxis2 = list(
      title = "Volume",
      domain = c(0, 0.21),
      showgrid = FALSE,
      side = "right"
    ),
    hovermode = "x unified",
    showlegend = FALSE,
    plot_bgcolor = "#fff",
    paper_bgcolor = "#fff",
    margin = list(t = 50, b = 35, l = 60, r = 55)
  ) |>
  config(
    responsive = TRUE,
    displayModeBar = TRUE,
    modeBarButtonsToRemove = c("lasso2d", "select2d"),
    toImageButtonOptions = list(
      format = "png",
      filename = paste0(ticker, "_", range_label),
      scale = 2
    )
  )

HTML(paste0(
  "<p><strong>", ticker, "</strong>",
  " · ", meta$exchangeName,
  " · Last: ", meta$currency, " $", round(last_price, 2),
  " · ", nrow(rows), " bars",
  " · ", range_label,
  "</p>"
))

HTML(paste0(
  '<h3>Financial Times</h3>',
  '<p><a href="https://www.ft.com/search?q=', URLencode("S&P 500"), '" target="_blank">',
  'Search FT for ', "S&P 500", ' news</a></p>',

  '<h3>Yahoo Finance</h3>',
  '<p><a href="https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/', "S&P 500", '/news/" target="_blank">',
  'All ', "S&P 500", ' news on Yahoo Finance</a></p>',

  '<p><a href="https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/', "S&P 500", '/financials/" target="_blank">',
  "S&P 500", ' financials on Yahoo Finance</a></p>',

  '<h3>Zacks</h3>',
  '<p><a href="https://www.zacks.com/stock/quote/', "S&P 500", '/detailed-earning-estimates" target="_blank">',
  "S&P 500", ' earnings estimates on Zacks</a></p>'
))

```
